title: taraxacum stenoglossum
intro: Taraxacum stenoglossum, also known as the narrow-leaved dandelion, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion genus. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its bitter compounds, which have been traditionally used to treat digestive issues, such as bloating and indigestion. The health benefits of Taraxacum stenoglossum include its potential to support liver function, lower blood pressure, and even exhibit anti-inflammatory properties, although more research is needed to confirm these effects. Traditionally, the plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
